name: dbt-wiki
description: Local-only LLM-queryable knowledge base for dbt projects. No dbt Cloud required. Init reads target/manifest.json (model metadata, ref/source lineage, schema.yml columns, tests) plus target/compiled/**/*.sql parsed via sqlglot to extract column-level lineage, plus dbt/models/**/*.sql raw files for SQL/jinja inline comments. Generates one markdown entity per model/source/macro under .dbt-wiki/, plus DAG visualization and tier/materialization indices. Refresh updates from new manifest snapshots; Ingest adds user-supplied context notes (preserved across refresh); Query answers natural-language questions about model structure, column-level data flow, materialization config, test coverage, refactoring impact (rename/delete propagation), and tribal knowledge from inline comments and user notes. Coexists with repo-wiki: dbt-wiki for STRUCTURE + dbt-internal context, repo-wiki for cross-cutting WHY. Scripts use PEP 723 inline metadata; sqlglot is auto-installed via `uv run` (recommended) or via `pip install sqlglot` if using plain python3.
